mappings.reason: Addresses unauthorized assets through removal or quarantine, satisfying the AM-03 requirement to assign an owner or otherwise remediate non-inventoried devices found during reconciliation.
Utilizes an active discovery tool to perform the network discovery scans required as the input mechanism for the quarterly inventory reconciliation process.
Utilizes a passive discovery tool which implements an equivalent network discovery mechanism class (passive variant) to support the scan reconciliation requirement under Rule 15.
